sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27961" key="dolfo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δολφός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δελφύς</foreign>) <sense id="n27961.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">womb,</tr_> Id.</sense> </entryFree>
